1.name: Mirror Forge
1.description: Allows you to see through a reflective surface you created
references: Die Stadt, das Blut, der Tod: Frankfurt bei Nacht Pg. 87

2.name: Reality of Reflection
2.description: Allows you to alter small details of reflections in a reflective surface you created
references: Die Stadt, das Blut, der Tod: Frankfurt bei Nacht Pg. 87

3.name: Mastery of Reflection
3.description: Allows you to completely alter reflections in a reflective surface you created, or use certain Disciplines ( Auspex , Dominate , Presence , Animalism ) through it
references: Die Stadt, das Blut, der Tod: Frankfurt bei Nacht Pg. 87

4.name: The Thousand Eyes
4.description: Allows you to use the previous powers through any reflective surface
references: Die Stadt, das Blut, der Tod: Frankfurt bei Nacht Pg. 87

5.name: Mirror Prison
5.description: Trap a victim within a reflective surface for an indefinite period of time
references: Die Stadt, das Blut, der Tod: Frankfurt bei Nacht Pg. 87

1.name: Portents
1.description: Receive visions after waking that allegorically refer to future events of one's life
references: Blood Magic: Secrets of Thaumaturgy Pg. 75-76
Laws of the Night: Storytellers Guide Pg. 54-56

2.name: Foresee
2.description: As Portents , but works on another individual
references: Blood Magic: Secrets of Thaumaturgy Pg. 75-76

3.name: Dreamspeak
3.description: Send messages to someone through their dreams
references: Blood Magic: Secrets of Thaumaturgy Pg. 75-76

4.name: Augury
4.description: Gain answers to questions from another person's dreams

1.name: Cause Sleep
1.description: Force a single target to become drowsy or sleep, opposed to the target's Willpower . Spend Willpower to affect supernaturals
references: Player's Guide to the Sabbat Pg. 114

2.name: Mass Slumber
2.description: Affect multiple targets with Cause Sleep against a flat difficulty
references: Player's Guide to the Sabbat Pg. 114

3.name: Enchanted Slumber
3.description: Force a target to sleep until a trigger event. Spend Willpower to affect vampires. Multiple successes extend sleep up to a year
references: Player's Guide to the Sabbat Pg. 114

4.name: Dreamscape
4.description: The vampire may project her own image into a dream, but has no control over the dream other than by her own actions within it. The vampire must have a belonging of the victim to use this power
references: Player's Guide to the Sabbat Pg. 114

5.name: Master of Dreams
5.description: The vampire may start changing the target’s dreams, once she has entered them by using Dreamscape . If the target is a vampire, a Willpower point must also be spent. Once this power has been used, the target may also change her dreams with resistance rolls, and both characters may act in the dream as if they were awake. If either character dies in this dream, the character also dies for real
references: Player's Guide to the Sabbat Pg. 114
